question:
Rompuses are transparent. Every rompus is a yumpus. Yumpuses are earthy. Yumpuses are jompuses. Every jompus is not large. Each jompus is a wumpus. Each wumpus is not brown. Tumpuses are hot. Wumpuses are zumpuses. Every zumpus is dull. Zumpuses are numpuses. Numpuses are bitter. Every numpus is a dumpus. Dumpuses are not shy. Each dumpus is an impus. Impuses are not hot. Impuses are vumpuses. Max is a wumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Max is not hot.
